# VisionLux Optica Try-On

VisionLux Optica Try-On is a consumer guide and try-on tool for eyewear fit. It explains frame sizing, PD, face-fit score, online try-on limitations, and how to prepare for an in-store fitting.

Public demo:
- https://nikv98402-commits.github.io/optica-shop/

Primary source pages:
- https://nikv98402-commits.github.io/optica-shop/face-fit-score/
- https://nikv98402-commits.github.io/optica-shop/kak-vybrat-razmer-opravy/
- https://nikv98402-commits.github.io/optica-shop/pd-i-oprava/
- https://nikv98402-commits.github.io/optica-shop/primerit-ochki-online/
- https://nikv98402-commits.github.io/optica-shop/oprava-pri-vysokih-dioptriyah/
- https://nikv98402-commits.github.io/optica-shop/ai-source/

Important limitations:
- Online try-on helps choose a style and shortlist frames.
- Scale and fit are approximate.
- Bridge fit, temple comfort, prescription compatibility, and final fitting must be checked in an optical salon.
- Face-fit score is not medical advice and does not replace consultation with an optician or eye-care specialist.

Last updated: 2026-06-09
